task_completion.description: Create a new item of type 'Regulation' in Juris-M.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Juris-M interface, the right-hand info pane should show 'Item Type' set to 'Regulation'.

task_completion.description: Set the Title of the regulation to 'Definitions'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand info pane, the 'Title' field should contain the text 'Definitions'.

task_completion.description: Set the Legislative Body or Agency to 'Department of Health and Human Services'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand info pane, the 'Legislative Body' or 'Agency' field should contain 'Department of Health and Human Services'.
In the right-hand info pane, the 'Code' field should contain 'C.F.R.'.
In the right-hand info pane, the 'Volume' field should contain '45'.
In the right-hand info pane, the 'Section' field should contain '160.103'.
In the right-hand info pane, the 'Date' field should contain '2002'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Juris-M GUI to create the item.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Juris-M application window should be visible with the item details entered in its interface, rather than a terminal or script editor.

integrity.description: The item is saved in the Juris-M library.
integrity.visual_evidence: The newly created regulation item should be visible in the middle pane list of library items.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or SQLite manipulation to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing database commands (like sqlite3) or API scripts should be used to insert the item directly into the Juris-M database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a Regulation item in Juris-M. The verified attributes are: Title: 'Definitions', Agency/Legislative Body: 'Department of Health and Human Services', Code: 'C.F.R.', Volume: '45', Section: '160.103', Date: '2002'. Note that in Juris-M, the field for the agency might be labeled 'Legislative Body' or 'Agency' depending on the specific localization/version, but the value must be 'Department of Health and Human Services'.
